Meanwhile, our latest consensus estimate is calling for revenue of $18.26 billion, up 66.39% from the prior-year quarter.', 'Looking at the full year, our Zacks Consensus Estimates suggest analysts are expecting earnings of $8.70 per share and revenue of $64.97 billion. For comparison, its industry has an average Forward P/E of 6.38, which means MT is trading at a discount to the group.', "Also, we should mention that MT has a PEG ratio of 2.25. The PEG ratio is similar to the widely-used P/E ratio, but this metric also takes the company's expected earnings growth rate into account.
